en_title: IO Interactive Won't Self-Publish Future James Bond Games; Amazon Will Have More Control
cn_title: 《詹姆斯·邦德》《IO Interactive》《007初露锋芒》续作发行权易主，亚马逊将掌控更多话语权
subtitle: 邦德易主
opus_summary: IO Interactive开发的《007初露锋芒》续作将不再由IO自行发行，而是由亚马逊和米高梅负责。亚马逊游戏工作室总经理Jeff Gattis确认，未来《007》游戏将由亚马逊游戏工作室发行，IO可能继续担任开发商。这意味着亚马逊将拥有更大财务和创意控制权，以联动其影视IP。该作首日销量达150万份，IGN评分9/10，续作几乎板上钉钉。

paragraphs.en: Future sequels to 007 First Light will be published by Amazon and MGM, not IO Interactive. In an interview with Polygon , Jeff Gattis, GM of gaming at Amazon, confirmed that Amazon Game Studios will handle publishing on future James Bond games.
paragraphs.cn: 《007初露锋芒》的续作将由亚马逊和米高梅发行，而非IO Interactive。在接受Polygon采访时，亚马逊游戏工作室总经理Jeff Gattis确认，未来《詹姆斯·邦德》游戏将由亚马逊游戏工作室负责发行。

paragraphs.en: "We did not [make First Light]," Gattis explained. "We do have a stake in it because we now own the IP, but that IP acquisition happened after the First Light IO deal was already done."
paragraphs.cn: 「我们并没有制作《初露锋芒》，」Gattis解释道，「但我们确实拥有其部分权益，因为我们现在拥有该IP，不过这笔IP收购是在IO的《初露锋芒》交易完成后才发生的。」

paragraphs.en: The deal Gattis is referring to is the one that allowed IO Interactive the power to self-publish 007 First Light, similar to Hitman 3. IO Interactive signed on to make Bond when the franchise was under control of MGM and EON Productions, the production company that managed the James Bond brand for decades. However, Amazon acquired MGM in 2021 (a year after the game had been announced) and eventually took full creative control of Bond in 2025.
paragraphs.cn: Gattis所指的交易，正是允许IO Interactive自行发行《007初露锋芒》的那份协议，类似于《杀手3》的模式。IO Interactive签约制作邦德游戏时，该系列还由米高梅和EON Productions（数十年来管理詹姆斯·邦德品牌的制片公司）掌控。然而，亚马逊于2021年（游戏公布一年后）收购了米高梅，并最终在2025年完全掌握了邦德的创意控制权。

paragraphs.en: Amazon and MGM still collaborated on 007 First Light to ensure the game was in line with what's expected from the brand, but it sounds like Amazon may have more control going forward. According to Gattis, sequels will be "done by MGM and, theoretically, by Amazon Game Studios."
paragraphs.cn: 亚马逊和米高梅在《007初露锋芒》上仍有合作，以确保游戏符合品牌预期，但听起来亚马逊未来可能会拥有更多控制权。据Gattis称，续作将「由米高梅完成，理论上，也由亚马逊游戏工作室完成。」

paragraphs.en: It's important to note that Amazon Game Studios is a publishing arm of Amazon. AGS is publishing the next two Tomb Raider titles, for instance. As a result, IO Interactive will likely continue to develop future Bond titles.
paragraphs.cn: 值得注意的是，亚马逊游戏工作室是亚马逊的发行部门。例如，AGS正在发行接下来的两款《古墓丽影》作品。因此，IO Interactive很可能会继续开发未来的邦德游戏。

paragraphs.en: However, this also means Amazon would be financially backing the project, meaning it may have a bigger say in what it wants to see in the game. Gattis even noted that Amazon is expanding into games to create synergy with Amazon's films and TV shows, something that will be undeniably important with the upcoming James Bond film .
paragraphs.cn: 不过，这也意味着亚马逊将为项目提供资金支持，因此它可能对游戏内容有更大的发言权。Gattis甚至指出，亚马逊正在向游戏领域扩张，以与亚马逊的电影和电视节目产生协同效应，这对于即将上映的詹姆斯·邦德电影来说无疑至关重要。

paragraphs.en: "We think that's a real opportunity for us to create IP that extends — or kind of expands upon — TV shows and movies. So there'll be a Tomb Raider TV show on Prime Video that'll go alongside the games. There's a lot of things we have in the works on new games that'll relate to Prime Video IP."
paragraphs.cn: 「我们认为这是一个真正的机会，可以创造延伸——或者说扩展——电视剧和电影的IP。因此，Prime Video上将有一部《古墓丽影》电视剧与游戏同步推出。我们正在筹备许多与Prime Video IP相关的新游戏。」

paragraphs.en: It seems like a sequel is all but guaranteed, as 007 First Light sold 1.5 million copies in its first 24 hours and IO Interactive overtly expressed its intentions for a sequel at the end of the game with a bold title card that read "James Bond will return." IO Interactive also previously stated its desire to do a trilogy of 007 games .
paragraphs.cn: 续作似乎几乎板上钉钉，因为《007初露锋芒》在首24小时内售出了150万份，且IO Interactive在游戏结尾通过一张醒目的标题卡明确表达了推出续作的意图，上面写着「詹姆斯·邦德将归来」。IO Interactive此前也曾表示希望制作一个007游戏三部曲。

paragraphs.en: IGN's Luke Reilly also gave 007 First Light a 9/10 in our review, noting that it is "obsessed with bringing the Bond fantasy to life in a way no one has ever managed before" and that "007 First Light is the best Bond game I’ve ever played."
paragraphs.cn: IGN的Luke Reilly也在评测中给《007初露锋芒》打出了9/10的高分，称其「痴迷于以前所未有的方式将邦德幻想变为现实」，并认为「《007初露锋芒》是我玩过的最好的邦德游戏」。

paragraphs.en: Cade Onder is a freelancer for IGN's news team. He covers all things entertainment, including gaming, film, and more. You can find him on Twitter @Cade_Onder.
paragraphs.cn: Cade Onder是IGN新闻团队的自由撰稿人，报道游戏、电影等一切娱乐内容。你可以在Twitter上关注他 @Cade_Onder。
